title: Garlicky Juicy Thai Lasagne Lasagna
description: A quick, vegetarian Thai-inspired lasagne that layers aromatic garlic, coconutmilk sauce, and tofu, finished with fresh herbs and a touch of lime.

ingredients.name: Firm tofu, cubed
ingredients.notes: Press to remove excess moisture before cubing

instructions: Preheat oven to 180 °C (350 °F). Lightly oil a 9×13 inch baking dish.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in red curry paste and cook another minute.
Pour in coconut milk, bring to a gentle simmer.
Add cubed tofu, sliced shiitake, and baby spinach. Cook 3–4 minutes until spinach wilts and tofu is heated through. Season with salt, pepper, and lime juice. Remove from heat.
Spread a thin layer of sauce in the prepared dish. Lay 4 lasagne sheets over the sauce.
Spoon and spread half of the tofu‑curry mixture over the sheets. Repeat with another layer of sheets and remaining sauce/mix until sheets are used; finish with sauce on top.
Cover the dish with foil and bake 25 minutes. Remove foil and bake an additional 10 minutes until the top is lightly browned and bubbling.
Let the lasagne rest 5 minutes before cutting. Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the top.
